'''âh-r-m''' ('''kaharam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vanish|vanish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vanish|vanish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-r-m
|-
! Lemma
| kaharam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiharam|thiharam]] || [[word:jiharam|jiharam]] || [[word:shiharam|shiharam]] || [[word:kiharam|kiharam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuharam|thuthuharam]] || [[word:jujuharam|jujuharam]] || [[word:shushuharam|shushuharam]] || [[word:kukuharam|kukuharam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuharam|thuharam]] || [[word:juharam|juharam]] || [[word:shuharam|shuharam]] || [[word:kuharam|kuharam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuharam|thuharam]] || [[word:juharam|juharam]] || [[word:shuharam|shuharam]] || [[word:kuharam|kuharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theharam|theharam]] || [[word:jeharam|jeharam]] || [[word:sheharam|sheharam]] || [[word:keharam|keharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoharam|thothoharam]] || [[word:jojoharam|jojoharam]] || [[word:shoshoharam|shoshoharam]] || [[word:kokoharam|kokoharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoharam|thoharam]] || [[word:joharam|joharam]] || [[word:shoharam|shoharam]] || [[word:koharam|koharam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoharam|thoharam]] || [[word:joharam|joharam]] || [[word:shoharam|shoharam]] || [[word:koharam|koharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠharam|thĂŠharam]] || [[word:jĂŠharam|jĂŠharam]] || [[word:shĂŠharam|shĂŠharam]] || [[word:kĂŠharam|kĂŠharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaharam|thathaharam]] || [[word:jajaharam|jajaharam]] || [[word:shashaharam|shashaharam]] || [[word:kakaharam|kakaharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaharam|thaharam]] || [[word:jaharam|jaharam]] || [[word:shaharam|shaharam]] || [[word:kaharam|kaharam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaharam|thaharam]] || [[word:jaharam|jaharam]] || [[word:shaharam|shaharam]] || [[word:kaharam|kaharam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaharam|shaharam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaharam|goshaharam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaharam|gokishaharam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaharamnĂŒ|shaharamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaharamnknĂŒ|goshaharamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaharamnĂŒ|gokishaharamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaharamshĂ«|shaharamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaharamnkshĂ«|goshaharamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaharamshĂ«|gokishaharamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaharamro|shaharamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaharamnkro|goshaharamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaharamro|gokishaharamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaharamu|shaharamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaharamnkmu|goshaharamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaharamu|gokishaharamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaharamsher|shaharamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaharamnksher|goshaharamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaharamsher|gokishaharamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaharamng|shaharamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaharamnkng|goshaharamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaharamng|gokishaharamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaharamya|shaharamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaharamnkya|goshaharamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaharamya|gokishaharamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaharamyam|shaharamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaharamnkyam|goshaharamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaharamyam|gokishaharamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaharamnĂŒshĂ«|shaharamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaharamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshaharamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaharamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishaharamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaharamnĂŒro|shaharamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaharamnknĂŒro|goshaharamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaharamnĂŒro|gokishaharamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaharamnĂŒmu|shaharamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaharamnknĂŒmu|goshaharamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaharamnĂŒmu|gokishaharamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaharamshĂ«nĂŒ|shaharamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaharamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshaharamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaharamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishaharamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaharamshĂ«ro|shaharamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaharamnkshĂ«ro|goshaharamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaharamshĂ«ro|gokishaharamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaharamshĂ«mu|shaharamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaharamnkshĂ«mu|goshaharamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaharamshĂ«mu|gokishaharamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaharamronĂŒ|shaharamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaharamnkronĂŒ|goshaharamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaharamronĂŒ|gokishaharamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaharamroshĂ«|shaharamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaharamnkroshĂ«|goshaharamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaharamroshĂ«|gokishaharamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaharamromu|shaharamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaharamnkromu|goshaharamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaharamromu|gokishaharamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaharamunĂŒ|shaharamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaharamnkmunĂŒ|goshaharamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaharamunĂŒ|gokishaharamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaharamushĂ«|shaharamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaharamnkmushĂ«|goshaharamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaharamushĂ«|gokishaharamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaharamuro|shaharamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaharamnkmuro|goshaharamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaharamuro|gokishaharamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
